questionHtml: Calculate the energy lost during the collision.
markschemeHtml:
12 × 0.200 × 12.02 − 12(0.252) × 5.712 ✓

10.3 J ✓ 

 

Award [1] for answer 11.5 J that neglects moment of inertia of particle but do not penalize this omission in (d)(i).
